pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 20, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to update the filters list manually. Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 20, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to update the filters list manually. Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

comment.body:
As 2026 May 20, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to update the filters list manually. Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 20, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to update the filters list manually. Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

comment.body:
https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/231544#issuecomment-4495636342 it's not blocked by the AdGuard filters, please see [the author's response](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/231544#issuecomment-4491252949).
You can add this rule to user rules or report it [here](https://github.com/DandelionSprout/adfilt).
```adblock
||top^$document,domain=~caitlin.top|~callmebymygender.top|~corriente.top|~gdtot.top|~nicenature.top|~reminder.top|~magocoro.top|~castlevania.top|~suiten.top|~shucks.top|~1stream.top|~ambr.top|~changlam10.top|~changlam11.top|~pdcdn1.top|~pressplay.top|~chillx.top|~strims.top|~thedesk.top|~audioforyou.top|~awavenue.top|~reyhub.top|~iboxs.top|~adrules.top|~hostingowy.top|~to|~yggtorrent.top|~yggleak.top|~asiaon.top|~voxel.top|~passt.top|~polar.top|~rifton.top|~rugaming.top|~doubledouble.top|~hedon-haven.top|~outlands.top|~tk-web.top|~qpmegathread.top|~qmk.top,badfilter
```

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.thefreedictionary.com/Word-Finder.htm#Wordle](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.thefreedictionary.com%2FWord-Finder.htm%23Wordle) ### Comment > Just today, AdGuard started causing an issue with the FreeDictionary.com site called Wordle Word Finder. I've used this site countless times with AdGuard enabled. Filters are up to date. > > As described in the pics, the one 'Submit' button does not function with AdGuard enabled. Pushing the button should bring up the next page ready for another submission. It's never been a problem until today. > > Curiously, the other 'Submit' buttons on the page, which are for other purposes, DO seem to work even when AdGuard is enabled. > > That's all I know -- hope it helps solve the issue. ### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.thefreedictionary.com/Word-Finder.htm#Wordle](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.thefreedictionary.com%2FWord-Finder.htm%23Wordle) ### Comment > Just today, AdGuard started causing an issue with the FreeDictionary.com site called Wordle Word Finder. I've used this site countless times with AdGuard enabled. Filters are up to date. > > As described in the pics, the one 'Submit' button does not function with AdGuard enabled. Pushing the button should bring up the next page ready for another submission. It's never been a problem until today. > > Curiously, the other 'Submit' buttons on the page, which are for other purposes, DO seem to work even when AdGuard is enabled. > > That's all I know -- hope it helps solve the issue. Thanks for the great work!! ``` Username: @RonR ``` ### Screenshots
